Heavy Metal Blood Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/heavy-metal-blood-test/ 
Heavy Metal Blood Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a heavy metal blood test? 
A heavy metal blood test is a group of tests that measures the levels of possibly harmful metals (like lead or mercury ) in your blood.
Heavy metals are found naturally in the environment. They're also found in certain medicines, supplements, and foods. Chemicals used in industry and farming may also contain heavy metals, which
